title: Influence of critical parameters of nanosuspension formulation on the permeability of a poorly soluble drug through the skin--a case study.

anchor_evidence.locator: permeation study using porcine and human skin on static vertical Franz Diffusion cells

anchor_evidence.locator: section discussing results and discussion of permeation rates
anchor_evidence.snippet: The permeation rate for the gel formulations was determined using Fick’s law... the flux observed for HPMC K100 was 15.2 μg/cm2/h.

notes: The study incorporates both Nanosuspension formulations and permeation examination under Franz diffusion testing.
